behavior_summary: Handles player interactions with a plaque item. On 'U8P_PLAQUEEW::look' (Event 0) it marks the plaque as informational/excluded and produces a short text output ('plaque ') via Item::bark so the player sees the plaque's label.

On 'use' (Event 1) it similarly marks the plaque as informational/excluded and then delegates the interactive behavior by spawning PLAQUENS::00C2 with the plaque's pid; the detailed 'use' effect is implemented in that spawned routine.
The script does not modify global flags; its effects are local to the item instance (setting item info and process-exclude) and producing or delegating presentation/interaction.
notable_control_flow: Entry on Event 0 ('U8P_PLAQUEEW::look'): set item info/process-exclude -> call Item::bark(pid, "plaque ") -> return/suspend.
Entry on Event 1 ('use'): set item info/process-exclude -> call spawn(pid, PLAQUENS::00C2) to create a delegated handler -> return/suspend.
Both handlers intentionally prevent default processing of the item (via process-exclude) before producing output or spawning the use-handler.
open_questions: Which exact item info key/value is set by the 'set info' opcode (interpreted here as an informational/process-exclude mark) and whether it carries additional metadata.
What precise gameplay behavior PLAQUENS::00C2 implements when spawned on 'use' (the script delegates the action but the effect is not present in this excerpt).
Whether Item::bark performs only a UI text display or may trigger other side-effects (sound, log) in some contexts.

main_function.name: U8P_PLAQUEEW::look
main_function.purpose: Present the plaque's short descriptive label to the player (via Item::bark) and mark the plaque as informational so it is excluded from normal processing.
entry_conditions: Event 0 — 'U8P_PLAQUEEW::look' / examine triggered when the Avatar or relevant actor inspects the plaque.

function_map.name: U8P_PLAQUEEW::look
function_map.role: Handle the 'U8P_PLAQUEEW::look' event: set item info/process-exclude and call Item::bark to present 'plaque ' to the player.

function_map.name: U8P_PLAQUEEW::use
function_map.role: Handle the 'use' event: set item info/process-exclude and spawn PLAQUENS::00C2 to perform the detailed use behavior.

function_map.name: Item::bark
function_map.role: Engine/UI routine called to emit a short string/message associated with an item (used here to show the plaque's label).

function_map.name: spawn
function_map.role: Engine routine used to launch a separate process (here PLAQUENS::00C2) to handle the plaque's 'use' behavior.

external_calls.purpose: Display or vocalize the plaque's short label string ('plaque ') to the player; used to implement the 'U8P_PLAQUEEW::look' UX.
Delegate the 'use' interaction to a separate process/function (PLAQUENS::00C2) that implements the actual effect of using the plaque.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Handles player interactions with a plaque item. On 'U8P_PLAQUEEW::look' (Event 0) it marks the plaque as informational/excluded and produces a short text output ('plaque ') via Item::bark so the player sees the plaque's label.
